title: マイルCSの後に・夢は何度でも！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: RAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: HYAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap refuses to lose, and Bamboo Memory
refuses to be beat! Who will emerge victorious
from today's deadlocked race?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
(I gotta give it all I got and set this place on fire!
Burn it up, burn it up, burn it up! I've gotta lay
down everything I've got...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: AND BUUUUURN BRIIIIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory has broken ahead! Bamboo
Memory is in the lead! She's keeping it, and...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Bamboo Memory crosses the finish line first!
Give it up for Bamboo Memory, the Ruler of the
Mile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Whoooooa! That was unbelievable! Look, I've got
goosebumps! Bamboo Memory's out of this world!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe she beat Oguri! She was supposed
to be invincible!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She did it. She put on a race so brilliant it pierced
my soul.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She really did! Talk about heart-pounding! She
makes me want to have a race just like that
someday!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That which seemed set it in stone has crumbled
today. Unexplored territory lies ahead—truly, this
is the dawn of a new era.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Congratulations, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: The passion... the energy...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That was... awesome.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I want to do this again. I want to make our next
race even better.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: And of course, I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's my dream now.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Of course! I would looove to have a race even better than today! In fact, I have to now!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Good. Then I'll look forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Traineeeer! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! Seriously! Thank you, thank you,
thank you, and—one more time—thank
yooooouuu!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: My dream finally came true!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not done yet! I'm gonna keep chasing new
dreams forever and ever and ever!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: So, please... Would you...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Heck yeah! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right, there's just one last thing we gotta do to
commemorate this moment! Ready?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
BAMBOOOOO!
MEMORYYYYY!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Emerging victorious from her red-hot rivalry with
Oguri Cap, Bamboo Memory takes her rightful
place as this generation's Ruler of the Mile!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A short while later...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"Continuing with the latest Twinkle Series news,
there's one sweltering race everyone's been
talking about! That's right, it's the Mile
Championship!"

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"Now, that was a race for the history books!
That's not to say last year's battle with Tamamo
Cross or the showdown between the Eternal Top
Three a few days ago weren't incredible..."

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"But Bamboo Memory has certainly proven herself
to be synonymous with mile races!"

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"And I think we got a clear picture of just how
huge a presence Bamboo is for Oguri!"

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
"I agree! My heart was still pounding well after
the race was over. I even found myself raving
about it to my daughter. She's still just a young
Umamusume, but..."

text_block_list.name: Commentator
text_block_list.text:
"She told me she wants to run in a race just like it
one day. I'm tearing up just remembering how her
eyes were shining when she said that. She's found
such a fantastic dream."

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: She found a dream...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hehe. That's great! I'm so happy to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not through yet! The dreams of our
generation are just starting to heat up! Things're
gonna get way hotter from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We're going to keep blowing people's minds with
even more incredible showdowns!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
OHHH MAN! Just saying it is getting me fired
uuuup!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's what I'm talking about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory and I sprint toward a brand new
future and the incredible races that await!
